name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Arcade Game
description: NES beat 'em up adaptation of Konami's arcade TMNT game, with extra console stages.
aliases: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Super Turtle Ninja
Teenage Mutant Hero Turtles: The Coin Op

backlog.reason: Classic NES TMNT beat 'em up and a useful home version of the arcade game.

access.notes: Included in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection.

acquisition.notes: Owned digitally through Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection.

notes: NES adaptation of the arcade game, not a straight one-to-one port.
